templates.name: Daily RSS Digest
templates.description: Fetches a public RSS feed on a schedule, summarizes the latest items with AI, and emails the digest.

templates.name: Daily Weather Briefing
templates.description: Fetches today’s weather for London on a schedule and sends a customized email message.

templates.name: Fortune Cookie
templates.description: The rune onboarding example: what does your fortune cookie say? Run this workflow and find out!

templates.name: GitHub Status
templates.description: GitHub down? Don't check. Automate this workflow and let server downtime be your signal to take a break.

templates.name: Help Wanted Issue Finder
templates.description: Fetches open help wanted issues from rune-org/rune and logs available issues to work on.

templates.name: Maintenance Window Check
templates.description: Checks the current time and logs whether the workflow is running inside a maintenance window.

templates.name: sheets → gmail tracker
templates.description: A google sheets / gmail integrated attendance tracker with AI reasoning.

templates.name: Uptime Threshold Check
templates.description: Fetches a public uptime metric and logs whether it meets the target availability threshold.
